About.title: Leading the Used Furniture Market Since 2008
About.description1: We are a trusted name in Khamis Mushait, specializing in the purchase of high-quality used furniture and household appliances. Our mission is to provide the best value to our customers through fair pricing and professional service.
About.description2: With over 15 years of experience, we have built a reputation for honesty and reliability. Whether you are moving or upgrading, we make the process of selling your items smooth and hassle-free.

WhyChoose.subtitle: Why Work With Us
WhyChoose.title: The Best Experience in Selling Used Items
WhyChoose.desc1: We provide a fair valuation for your used items, ensuring you get the highest price compared to other buyers.
WhyChoose.desc2: No waiting for bank transfers. Once we agree on a price, we pay you immediately in cash on the spot.
WhyChoose.desc3: You don't need to worry about transport. Our team will come to your location and pick up the items for free.
WhyChoose.desc4: Our team is always ready to respond to your calls and messages. We value your time and reach you quickly.

questions.q: What types of items do you buy?
questions.a: We buy all kinds of used household items including bedroom sets, sofas, dining tables, split and window ACs, refrigerators, washing machines, and other electronics.

questions.q: How do you evaluate the price?
questions.a: Our experts evaluate the items based on their current condition, brand, and age. We guarantee to provide the most competitive and fair price in the Khamis Mushait market.

questions.q: Do you offer free home pickup?
questions.a: Yes! Once we agree on a price, our team will come to your home, handle the dismantling and loading, and transport the items for free.

questions.q: When and how do I get paid?
questions.a: We believe in transparency. You will receive the full payment in cash immediately on the spot before we load the items from your location.
We primarily cover Khamis Mushait, Abha, and all surrounding areas in the Asir region.

AboutHero.title: Leading the Business with Integrity and
AboutHero.description: I am MD Abdullah, an entrepreneur dedicated to transforming the used furniture and appliances trade in Khamis Mushait. My focus is on building sustainable businesses that value trust and customer satisfaction above all else.

BrandStory.subtitle: Our Heritage
BrandStory.title: The Story Behind Khamis Buyers
BrandStory.story1: It all started in 2008 in the heart of Khamis Mushait. With just a small vision and a commitment to honesty, MD Abdullah began exploring the used furniture market. Back then, the goal was simple: to help people find value in every item.
BrandStory.story2: As the years passed, we evolved from a small local initiative into a trusted brand. We didn't just buy and sell; we built relationships. Our reputation for fair pricing and instant cash payments became our signature in the Asir region.
BrandStory.story3: Today, Khamis Buyers stands as a symbol of reliability. We manage a vast portfolio of high-quality household items and electronics, serving thousands of satisfied customers every year while maintaining the same core values we started with.

MissionVision.missionDesc: To provide fair value and sustainable solutions for used goods, ensuring every household in Khamis Mushait can buy and sell with absolute trust and transparency.
MissionVision.visionDesc: To be the most respected and innovative leader in the pre-owned furniture and appliances industry across the Asir region, driven by integrity and service excellence.

WhatWeSell.title: Premium Quality Pre-owned Goods
WhatWeSell.description: We specialize in a wide range of high-quality used furniture and appliances. Every item we purchase or sell undergoes a strict quality check to ensure it meets our standards of excellence.

WhatWeSell.cat5Desc: High-performance split and window AC units from leading brands.
WhatWeSell.cat6Desc: Large screen LEDs, sound systems, and small appliances.

WorkProcess.subtitle: How It Works
WorkProcess.title: Four Simple Steps to Sell Your Items
WorkProcess.step1Desc: Reach out to us via WhatsApp or Phone and send photos of the items you want to sell.
WorkProcess.step2Desc: Our experts will review the photos or visit your location for a professional price valuation.
WorkProcess.step3Desc: Once we agree on the price, we provide the full payment in cash immediately on the spot.
WorkProcess.step4Desc: Our logistics team handles the dismantling and free transport of the items from your home.
